name: Carnival Phantasm
original_name: カーニバル・ファンタズム
overview: Comedy OVA series based on the Type-Moon Gag manga, Take-Moon. It focuses on funny and absurd situations happening to the various characters of the Type-Moon franchises, mostly from Fate/stay night and Tsukihime.

trailers.title: Opening | Super☆Affection - Minami Kuribayashi, Miyuki Hashimoto, Faylan, Aki Misato, Yozuca* and Rino [Subtitled]
